title: First Prize - Smart India Hackathon 2025
description: Team of 6 PSR IT students won the national-level Smart India Hackathon with their AI-powered healthcare solution for rural communities.

title: Best Paper Award - IEEE Conference
description: Research paper on 'Federated Learning for Edge Devices' received the Best Paper Award at IEEE International Conference, co-authored by PSR faculty and student.

title: NPTEL Star - Cloud Computing
description: P. Dharani scored 96% in NPTEL Cloud Computing certification, ranking among top 1% nationally. PSR IT recognised as NPTEL Local Chapter.

title: NAAC 'A' Grade Accreditation
description: PSR Engineering College received prestigious NAAC 'A' Grade accreditation, recognising overall institutional excellence and quality standards.

title: NBA Accreditation - IT Department
description: The IT Department received NBA Accreditation, affirming our commitment to outcome-based education and quality teaching standards.

title: Anna University Gold Medal
description: K. Preethi secured Anna University first rank and gold medal in B.Tech Information Technology from the PSR IT Department.

title: Startup Incubation Award
description: Student startup 'AgriTech Sivakasi' received ₹5 Lakh seed funding from the PSR Incubation Centre for a smart agriculture IoT solution.
